properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v3 v6 v3 v7

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Everyone knows you as a man of honor I am glad to know you simply as a friend You've always taken time to be my brother And I'll be standing by you in the end

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: But I will never put you on a pedestal I thank the Lord for everything you do I'll be there to pray for you and for the ones you love I believe that He will finish all he started in you.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I will be an open door that you can count on Anywhere you are, anywhere you've been I will be an honest heart you can depend on I will be a faithful friend

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I am one of many whose path has been made clear By the light you've carried faithfully as a warrior and a child God has used you greatly to encourage and inspire And you've remained a true friend all the while

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: So I will never put you on a pedestal Cause we both know all the glory is the Lord's But I'll be there to pray that He will keep you by his grace And I always will remind you to be seeking His face

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Should there ever come a time to cry I will weep with you And every single time you win I'm celebrating too Oh, I will celebrate with you

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: I will be faithful Ooh, I will be a faithful friend
